Who We Are

Build Value.
Unlock Potential.

At General Interest, we guide business owners through the most critical transitions — from acquisition and due-diligence to full ownership transfer. Our team brings decades of combined expertise in infrastructure, construction, and technology consulting.

"Our goal is to equip you with the essential resources and guidance to transform your business vision into reality."

— General Interest Advisory Team
Our Expertise

Comprehensive Support For Every Phase Of Business Transition

✓

End-To-End Due Diligence

Thorough financial, operational, and legal evaluation of target businesses to mitigate risk and reveal true value.

✓

Seamless Ownership Transfers

Structured transition planning that protects continuity, preserves culture, and maximizes deal value for both parties.

Acquisition• Due Diligence• Ownership Transfer• Consulting• Acquisition• Due Diligence• Ownership Transfer• Consulting• Acquisition• Due Diligence• Ownership Transfer• Consulting•
Services

Empowering Businesses Through Critical Transitions

Business Acquisition Consulting

Strategic advisory for identifying, evaluating, and acquiring mid-size businesses in infrastructure and construction.

Due-Diligence Evaluations

Comprehensive assessments covering financials, operations, compliance, and market position — leave nothing to chance.

Ownership Transfer Planning

End-to-end support for business sales and transfers, including valuation, negotiation, and post-close integration.

Market Research & Analysis

Data-driven insights into industry trends, competitive landscapes, and growth opportunities in your target sector.

How We Work

Consulting For Enhanced Clarity And Confidence

01

Strategic Planning & Discovery

We start by understanding your goals, market position, and ideal acquisition or exit profile.
02

Evaluation & Due Diligence

Our team conducts rigorous financial and operational analysis to validate value and identify risks.
03

Negotiation & Close

We support deal structuring, negotiation, and smooth handoff to ensure a successful outcome for all parties.
Why General Interest

For Others, It's Just Business.
For Us, It's Personal.

We specialize in mid-size development companies across infrastructure, construction, design, and engineering technology. Our approach is hands-on, our relationships are long-term, and our commitment is to your success — not just the transaction.

Infrastructure & Construction

Deep operational knowledge of the firms that build and maintain critical infrastructure across the country.

Design & Engineering Tech

Understanding of the technology landscape that powers modern design, engineering, and project delivery.

Our Team

A diverse group of builders, designers, and operators driving impact.

Aaron David Mendonca

Innovation & Corporate Development

Leverages expertise in architecture, energy, and business development. Former Head of BD at WeWork Construction Innovation.

Adalberto Avila

Design & Media

Seasoned motion graphics designer at NBCUniversal Telemundo. Expert in broadcast design, 3D animation, and creative strategy.

Tim Dumatrait

Technology & Construction

Passionate craftsperson and systems thinker with 15 years driving creative design and technology solutions across product and construction.

Discover How Our Advisory Can Transform Your Next Deal

Whether you're acquiring, selling, or transitioning a business, our team is here to ensure you move forward with confidence and clarity.
